basic_details.job_title: IIM Ahmedabad Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Assistant/ Research Associate Posts
basic_details.short_information: IIMA is recruiting 4 Research Assistant / Research Associate posts at the Mattu Centre.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | added advantage: Familiarity with statistical analysis, business analytics, data visualization. Working knowledge of tools such as Stata, R, Python, or Excel. | age limit: Maximum 35 years as of the application deadline.
qualification.education_qualification: Strong research, analytical, and writing skills. Ability to gather, synthesize, and analyse qualitative and quantitative information. Excellent attention to detail. Ability to work independently as well as in teams. Strong problem-solving capabilities.

how_to_apply: Interested candidates are requested to submit:
A writing sample (report, article, case study, blog, or similar work)
Applications should be sent via email to Dr. Vaishali Joshi at [email protected] on or before 03 July, 2026.
important_instructions: Selected candidates will have access to IIMA’s library and computing facilities. Candidates are expected to arrange their own accommodation outside the IIMA campus. The position is initially for one year and extendable based on performance. Compensation will be as per IIMA guidelines and candidate’s qualifications/experience.

all_official_links.label: IIM Ahmedabad Mattu Centre Research Assistant

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIM Ahmedabad Mattu Centre Research Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for the IIM Ahmedabad Mattu Centre Research Assistant/Research Associate Recruitment 2026 is 03 July 2026. Candidates must send their application documents via email before the deadline. Applications received after the closing date may not be considered for the recruitment process.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in IIM Ahmedabad Mattu Centre Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The Indian Institute of Management Ahmedabad (IIMA) has announced a total of 04 vacancies for the positions of Research Assistant and Research Associate. These positions are available under the Mattu Centre for Research in Security Pricing and Corporate Finance. Eligible candidates with strong research and analytical skills are encouraged to apply.

faq.question: Q3. What are the eligibility criteria for IIM Ahmedabad Research Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applicants should possess strong research, analytical, and writing skills along with the ability to collect and analyze qualitative and quantitative data. Candidates must also demonstrate attention to detail and problem-solving abilities. Knowledge of research methodologies and academic writing will be beneficial for the role.

faq.question: Q4. Is prior experience with statistical tools required for the IIMA Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: While not mandatory, familiarity with statistical and data analysis tools such as Stata, R, Python, or Excel is considered an added advantage. Candidates with experience in business analytics, data visualization, and quantitative research may have better opportunities during the selection process. These skills are valuable for supporting research projects at the Centre.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for IIM Ahmedabad Mattu Centre Research Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 35 years as of the application deadline. Candidates should ensure that they meet the age requirement before submitting their applications. Any applicable relaxations will be subject to institutional guidelines and recruitment policies.

faq.question: Q6. What is the tenure of the Research Assistant/Research Associate position at IIMA?
faq.answer: The appointment is initially offered for a period of one year. However, the tenure may be extended depending on the candidate's performance and the Centre's requirements. This provides an excellent opportunity for individuals seeking research experience in finance and capital market studies.

faq.question: Q7. What documents are required to apply for IIM Ahmedabad Research Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must submit a detailed Curriculum Vitae (CV) along with a writing sample, such as a report, article, case study, blog, or similar work. These documents help the selection committee assess the applicant's research, analytical, and communication skills. Incomplete applications may not be shortlisted.
